assert(to_spec_result(result@.push((k + 1) as i64)) =~= old_s.push((k + 1) as int));

assert forall|p: int| 1 <= p <= k + 1 && !(#[trigger] point_covered_by_any(p, seg_spec)) implies exists|q: int| 0 <= q < result.len() && result[q] == p by { if p <= k { // From old invariant let q_old

placeholders.original_text: assert forall|p: int| #![auto] 0 <= p < m implies (a_vec[p] <==> forall|idx2: int| 0 <= idx2 < (i + 1) as int ==> !point_in_segment(p + 1, seg_spec[idx2])) by { if seg_a - 1 <= p && p < seg_b { // p is in segment i's range, so a_vec[p] is false assert(a_vec[p] == false); assert(point_in_segment(p + 1, seg_spec[i as int])); // so !(forall idx2 :: ... ==> !PointInSegment)  since idx2=i fails } else { // p is not in segment i's range assert(!point_in_segment(p + 1, seg_spec[i as int])); assert(a_vec[p] == a_before[p]); // a_before[p] <==> forall idx2 < i ==> !PointInSegment // and !PointInSegment(p+1, seg[i]), so the forall extends to i+1 } }
assert(to_spec_result(result@.push((k + 1) as i64)) =~= old_s.push((k + 1) as int));

assert forall|p: int| 1 <= p <= k + 1 && !(#[trigger] point_covered_by_any(p, seg_spec)) implies exists|q: int| 0 <= q < result.len() && result[q] == p by { if p <= k { // From old invariant let q_old = choose|q: int| 0 <= q < old_result.len() && old_result[q] == p; assert(0 <= q_old < result.len()); assert(result[q_old] == p); } else { // p == k + 1 assert(a_vec[k as int] == true);  // because !covered(p) and a_vec <==> !covered // We entered the if branch and pushed k+1 assert(result[result.len() - 1] == (k + 1) as i64); assert(result[result.len() - 1] == p); } } }
